title: goodyera oblongifolia
intro: Goodyera oblongifolia, also known as rattlesnake plantain or rattlesnake fern, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Goodyera oblongifolia are attributed to its ability to alleviate symptoms of menstrual cramps, fever, and sore throats, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for herbal use by drying and making it into a tea or infusing it in hot water to harness its medicinal properties.
